title: FloristryWarehouse Faux Silk Artificial Narcissus Mini Daffodil Flower Bunch 55cm/21 Inches Yellow
features: This artificial Daffodil or Narcissus flower bunch has 3 stems of delicate small flower heads
6 flowers on each stem to give 18 in total on wired green stems and bound with a raffia tie
Flower heads have a diameter of 6.5cm/2.5 inches
description: These artificial popular Spring flowers capture their essence, allowing you to enjoy their vibrant beauty throughout the year without the need for seasonal changes. This artificial Daffodil or Narcissus flower bunch has 3 stems of delicate small flower heads. 6 flowers on each stem to give 18 in total. Three wired green stems are bound with a raffia tie. Flower heads have a diameter of 6.5cm/2.5 inches. Overall bunch height 55cm/21 inches. The stems are internally wired to retain the desired shape and all the stems merge into one for easy potting or arranging in a vase. The bunch can also be cut for use in arrangements. Available in Pink, white or Yellow. The bunch is delivered in a slightly compacted form for protection during postage, but the individually wired stems are easily separated and arranged to suit. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
